task_description: Execute Phase 8 (Universal Search, Knowledge, and Memory) and Phase 9 (App-Specific Product Completion) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous build plan. Phase 8 adds saved searches, alerts, search observability, reindex jobs, and NL query enhancement to the existing search package. Phase 9 fills in core service logic for all 13 apps to meet their launch gates, culminating in QuantAI operating across 5 apps in demo mode.

verification.summary: All gates green: typecheck 72/72, build 51/51, test 75/75, lint 61/61, audit 0 high vulns. Tests exercise real logic with meaningful assertions.

review_fixes.summary: Fixed all 9 issues from 2025-01-20-070000-review.md: reindex auth, orchestration DEMO_MODE gating, in-memory store docs, metrics cap, copyFile fresh encryption, encrypted message search filter, thread mute/snooze metadata approach, getBookmarks fix, saved search word boundary matching.

review_fixes_v2.summary: Fixed 3 remaining issues from 2025-01-20-071500-review.md: (1) Scoped admin auth hook using Fastify plugin encapsulation so /healthz and /readyz are not gated. (2) Replaced nonexistent EmailThread.metadata field with in-memory Map<threadId, ThreadPreferences> for mute/snooze. (3) Replaced nonexistent Post.metadata field with in-memory Map<userId, Set<postId>> bookmark store.
